query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `proposal_drinks` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `proposalId` int NOT NULL,
  `ownerId` int NOT NULL,
  `barOption` enum('bar_tab','cash_bar','bar_tab_then_cash','unlimited') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'cash_bar',
  `tabAmount` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `selectedDrinks` json NOT NULL,
  `customDrinks` json NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `proposal_drinks_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `proposal_drinks_proposalId_unique` UNIQUE(`proposalId`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `proposal_drinks` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `proposalId` int NOT NULL,
  `ownerId` int NOT NULL,
  `barOption` enum('bar_tab','cash_bar','bar_tab_then_cash','unlimited') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'cash_bar',
  `tabAmount` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `selectedDrinks` json NOT NULL,
  `customDrinks` json NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `proposal_drinks_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `proposal_drinks_proposalId_unique` UNIQUE(`proposalId`)
);
